subcodes.first_line: Praise and glorification befit the Lord of the realms of grace and bounty, Who hath, with the hand of divine favor, planted trees in the garden of munificence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد و ثنا مالک ممالک فضل و عطا را سزا که بید عنایت در حدیقه مکرمت اشجاری غرس
subcodes.subjects: @exhortations and counsels, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @business; financial; property matters, @love and unity, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @spiritual transformation, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @wisdom [hikmat]
